/usr/bin/c++  -mcmodel=large -std=c++23 -g -nostdlib -ffreestanding -fno-use-cxa-atexit -fno-exceptions -fno-builtin -fno-rtti -fno-omit-frame-pointer -fno-asynchronous-unwind-tables -mno-red-zone -static -lgcc -Wl,--wrap=__stack_chk_fail -T/home/PS/PS_git/OS_pj_uefi/kernel/kld.ld -g -mgeneral-regs-only -fno-lto -fpermissive -fno-PIC "-DKERNEL_MODE>" "-DPGLV_4>"
